remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return CARDNAME from your graveyard to your hand.

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, you may sacrifice a nontoken creature. If you do, draw X cards, then mill X cards, where X is that creature's power.

params.Description: CARDNAME's power and toughness are each equal to the total power of the exiled cards used to craft it.

CARDNAME has flying as long as an exiled card used to craft it has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, protection, reach, trample, and vigilance.
params.AddKeyword: Flying & First Strike & Double Strike & Deathtouch & Haste & Hexproof & Indestructible & Lifelink & Menace & Protection & Reach & Trample & Vigilance
